subtitle: Senior Data & Technology Leader -- Production ML | Mission-Driven Practice | Regulatory-Grade Governance
summary_text: Senior data and technology leader with 14 years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education under continuous regulatory scrutiny (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB across all 50 states). Bottom-up arc: DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions in a regulated environment where model failures have real consequences for real people's financial lives. Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team with the highest retention and satisfaction in the organization across 14 years. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation (reactive reporting -> proper DW -> self-service trajectory), and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions in a regulated environment where model failures have real consequences for real people's financial lives.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the organization across 14 years; team-of-teams structure including Head of Data, Head of Infrastructure, ePMO leader, and two software development leads.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across 12+ executive stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization.

Sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance; embedded performance analytics into daily operations producing 10-20% sustained improvement across key IT metrics.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Pipelines, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau, Cross-Functional Data Definitions
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, AI Governance
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Multi-Factor Prioritization
